semanticSummary.explanation: Absolute-positioned profile editing screen with multiple text inputs, dropdown selectors, a selected-tags area, a commission range slider, and a primary save action.
warnings: Keyboard-safe scrolling may be required for the lower form region on smaller viewports.

semanticVerdicts.explanation: Labelled single-line text field for the user's first name.
Labelled single-line text field for the user's last name.
Single-select dropdown for broker operating countries.
URL text input for the broker website.
Multiline description field for the user profile bio.
Range slider for broker commission size.
Primary save action for the edit-profile flow.
